stemHtml: While holding short of the runway, there is a red crossbar across the holding point in front of you. When can you cross the runway?

options.a: After the controller has approved you to cross and the crossbar red lights go off.
options.b: After the controller has approved you to cross and the crossbar lights turn green.
options.c: There is no need to contact the controller, and you are free to cross anytime.
options.d: After the controller has approved you to cross and the lights stay red.
